div.div: Figure D2. Weighted-logit ensemble architecture. Nine independently trained models (3 encoders x 3 seeds) are combined via Nelder-Mead optimised weights. Arrow thickness is proportional to weight. BanglaBERT seed=42 dominates (w=0.282).
